ValidationRule.description: 「辞退」/「単価見積」以外は価格案_CPは必須
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( AND( QuoteBiddingInquiry__r.Refusal__c = false, QuoteBiddingInquiry__r.UnitPriceEstimation__c = false ), QuoteBiddingInquiry__r.Creating__c = false, QuoteBiddingInquiry__r.RecordType.DeveloperName != "SH", ISBLANK(CP__c ) )
